# SPARC Rotation Curve Database

## Source
- **Paper:** Lelli, McGaugh & Schombert (2016), "SPARC: Mass Models for 175 Disk Galaxies"
- **URL:** http://astroweb.cwru.edu/SPARC/
- **Version:** SPARC v2.0 (175 galaxies)

## Contents
- Rotation curves (radius, v_obs, v_gas, v_disk, v_bulge) for 175 late-type galaxies
- Surface photometry (3.6 micron Spitzer)
- HI gas maps

## Notes
If the full SPARC database is not downloaded, `analysis/16_sparc_remnants.py` uses representative data for NGC 6503 (a well-studied galaxy with a clear dark matter gap).

## Citation
```bibtex
@article{Lelli2016,
  author = {Lelli, F. and McGaugh, S.S. and Schombert, J.M.},
  title = {SPARC: Mass Models for 175 Disk Galaxies with Spitzer Photometry and Accurate Rotation Curves},
  journal = {AJ},
  year = {2016},
  volume = {152},
  pages = {157}
}
```
